{{Quote|But unless you embrace the new future that we the United Tribes of Kariek have forged, we will be no better off than we were before they came|[[Su-mil]]|<ref name="Fool's Bargain">''[[Fool's Bargain]]''</ref>}}
The '''United Tribes of Kariek''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] state on [[Kariek]] located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] near the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], formed by the [[United Tribes Agreement]] which ended the fighting between numerous [[Eickarie]] tribes, and was governed by the [[InterTribal Council]]. Around [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], the [[United Tribes Command]] [[Capture of the Warlord|thwarted]] [[the Warlord]] with military support from the [[Empire of the Hand]].

==Behind the scenes==
The "''United Tribes of Kariek''" borrows the name of some realworld governments including the United States of America and the former United States of Indonesia.

==Appearances==
*''[[Fool's Bargain]]'' {{1st}}
